raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current energy check","name":"How are you feeling energy-wise now after your recent illness?","description":"Explores current energy levels and any lingering effects from recent illness.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"UX priorities focus","name":"What are the main UX priorities you're focusing on right now?","description":"Determines if Carl is still focused on key UX work or getting sidetracked.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"Is there anything specific you need more of from me right now?","description":"Surfaces any unspoken needs Carl might have for manager support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Project clarity","name":"Where are you feeling unclear about current project engagement","name":"How engaged do you feel with the team's direction right now?","description":"Assesses Carl's engagement with the current team direction and projects.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps clarity","name":"What do you see as your next step for moving forward on your projects?","description":"Clarifies Carl's next steps and priorities for his current projects.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Lightening the load","name":"What could make your next two weeks feel lighter or more productive?","description":"Explores opportunities to reduce stress or increase productivity for Carl.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]}]}
